languages.text: "Все рода — кукловоды и манипуляторы. Не полагайся ни на кого".
"All houses are puppeteers and manipulators. Do not put your faith in anyone."
languages.original_text: "Все рода — кукловоды и манипуляторы. Не полагайся ни на кого".

traits.locale_text: "All houses are puppeteers and manipulators. Do not put your faith in anyone."
"All houses are puppeteers and manipulators. Do not put your faith in anyone."
"All houses are puppeteers and manipulators. Do not put your faith in anyone."

languages.text: 「すべての家は人形遣いと操り手である。誰にも信じるな」
languages.original_text: "All houses are puppeteers and manipulators. Do not put your faith in anyone."
"All houses are puppeteers and manipulators. Do not put your faith in anyone."

languages.text: “所有家族都是善于操控人心之人。不要轻信任何一方。”
languages.original_text: "All houses are puppeteers and manipulators. Do not put your faith in anyone."

traits.locale_text: “所有家族都是善于操控人心之人。不要轻信任何一方。”

languages.text: "Alle Häuser sind manipulative Puppenspieler. Ihr könnt niemandem vertrauen."
languages.original_text: "All houses are puppeteers and manipulators. Do not put your faith in anyone."

traits.locale_text: "Alle Häuser sind manipulative Puppenspieler. Ihr könnt niemandem vertrauen."

languages.text: « Chaque maison est marionnettiste et manipulatrice. Ne vous fiez à personne. »
languages.original_text: "All houses are puppeteers and manipulators. Do not put your faith in anyone."

traits.locale_text: « Chaque maison est marionnettiste et manipulatrice. Ne vous fiez à personne. »

languages.text: «Todas las casas son taimadas y manipuladoras. No confíe en nadie».
languages.original_text: "All houses are puppeteers and manipulators. Do not put your faith in anyone."

traits.locale_text: «Todas las casas son taimadas y manipuladoras. No confíe en nadie».
